payload.title: ADR: sync-cursor protocol & reconciliation guarantees
payload.description: Write docs/adr/0002-sync-cursor-protocol.md: ULID high-water cursor (rejecting per-tenant sequence and vector clock, with rationale), pull/push shapes, the 'server reconciliation == local file-union replay' invariant, idempotency via content-addressed ULIDs, renumber-notice propagation, and the clock-skew/backfill edge handled by a count guard. Cross-ref ADR-0001. (From SCP-123.)
